title: After Office Hours
writer: Laurence Stallings, Dale Van Every, Herman J. Mankiewicz
actors: Constance Bennett, Clark Gable, Stuart Erwin
plot: Hard-hitting news editor Jim Branch falls for high-society type Sharon Norwood but can't get to first base as he continually makes use of her knowledge of the rich and famous to try to solve the murder of one of her socialite acqu...
